title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Session wrapped after adding and pushing the audited product status accounting. Latest pushed commit is 32c258f docs: add product status accounting. docs/product-status.md is now the current source of truth for built/partial/not-started product status, README points to it first, and docs/implementation-plan.md roadmap language was corrected so Layer 1 is mostly complete, Layer 3 engine/planner is mostly complete, Layer 4 provider boundary is substantially implemented, and Layers 5-8 remain future product expansion. Verification before commit: uv run pytest => 133 passed; git diff --check passed. Post-push status: main clean and aligned with origin/main.
next_actions: Next slice: begin Layer 2 by finalizing summary/verbatim artifact contracts and repair/regenerate UX before implementation. Start from docs/product-status.md and docs/artifact-contract.md; update contracts before code.
